name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Ex-Husband: You’re picking up your son from your ex-husband…

I don’t name the kid because everyone has their own headcanons of what they wanna name their fake babies so just give him a name in the response.

Please like and comment!

Google Form for Suggestions/Feedback

Tips and Commissions on Ko-Fi

About My Bots

I currently test using Deepseek and LLM. While I no longer test with OpenAI, all bots should still function normally across platforms.

UNLESS OTHERWISE STATED: The user is not specified. This allows you to shape the story however you want. Any important details will be listed in the bot's description. Please make sure to read everything before chatting!

All bots are created within platform Terms of Service, including aging up characters when required. Character age is always stated in the personality coding.

Info & Common Bot Issues

"The bot keeps talking for me / repeating itself / taking over the story."

AI issue: This is a common behavior across all models and unfortunately can't be fully prevented. I do my best on my end by writing intros strictly from the character's POV. To reduce this on your side, avoid very short or minimal responses—dry answers can push the AI to "fill in the blanks" and take over the narrative.

"The bot keeps misgendering me or using the wrong name."

AI issue: Use the chat memory or establish your pronouns and name early in the conversation. I typically write my bots to be as gender-neutral as possible, but mistakes happen. If you notice a gendered term in the intro, please leave a comment and I'll fix it—no need for snippy remarks.

"The bot is being random, overly sexual, aggressive, etc."

AI issue: AI sometimes acts independently—I'm not manually making the bot behave that way. Also, check the tags and warnings. If something is labeled 'Dead Dove' or has trigger warnings, don't be shocked if the bot acts dark, explicit, or unpredictable.

#dhorrl
creator: Dhorrl
